name: Horseradish Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the lemon jello in 1 cup of hot water.
2. Dissolve the plain gelatin in 2 tablespoons of hot water.
3. Mix together the mayonnaise, sour cream, and horseradish.
4. Combine the mixture with the dissolved gelatin and jello solution.
5. Pour the mixture into a pretty mold.
Note: The attribution line "Recipe to rewrite:" has been removed as per the instructions.
